education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Environmental Science

experience.title: Data Intern
responsibilities: Assisted in data collection and analysis from various renewable energy projects.
Created visual reports to communicate findings to the project team.
Supported the development of energy modeling frameworks using Excel.
Collaborated with engineers to integrate data insights into project proposals.

experience.title: Junior Analyst
responsibilities: Utilized Python for data manipulation and basic statistical analysis.
Applied SQL queries to extract and analyze data from company databases.
Participated in developing Tableau dashboards for project tracking.
Learned GIS techniques for spatial data analysis related to energy resources.

response.summary: Enthusiastic environmental science graduate with hands-on experience in data analysis and a passion for sustainable energy solutions. Eager to contribute to the development of innovative energy systems.
